Ethics & Morality: Treat others as you would like to be treated
Good increases well-being, evil causes suffering
Intent matters, but results matter more
Law & Justice: Law is binding on all within a territory
Everyone presumed innocent until proven guilty
Psychology: Depression is absence of emotion, not sadness
Mental Health: Trauma is subjective reaction to threat
Logic & Reasoning: A and not-A cannot both be true
Absence of evidence is not evidence of absence
Science & Physics: Nothing with mass reaches light speed
Numbers & Math: Infinity is a concept, not a number
Life & Evolution: Evolution has no goal or direction
Humans and monkeys share common ancestor
Economics: Resources are limited relative to desires
